$comment: scripts/Route22.asm — rival battle 1 at the League gate ((29,4)/(29,5)): he appears at (25,5), walks east stopping alongside you, the OPP_RIVAL1 fight (party by HIS starter), his line, the flag, and the slink west, gone. (gh #177: he stops beside, never on top.)

trigger.when: GOT_POKEDEX and not BEAT_BROCK and not BEAT_ROUTE22_RIVAL_1

commands.text:
{rival}: Hey!
{player}! You're going to
POKéMON LEAGUE? Forget it! You
probably don't
have any BADGEs! The guard won't
let you through! By the way, did
your POKéMON
get any stronger?

then.text:
I heard POKéMON
LEAGUE has many
tough trainers! I have to figure
out how to get
past them! You should quit
dawdling and get
a move on!
